name: Crostini Rossi (Weir)
recipeIngredient: 2 large ripe tomatoes, peeled and cored
3 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tomatoes in a strainer set over a bowl and let drain for 15 minutes.
2. Drizzle one slice of sourdough bread with vinegar and let sit for 1 minute. Gently wring out excess liquid.
3. Add the remaining olive oil, capers, garlic, chopped parsley, thyme, crushed red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper to a food processor. Pulse until combined.
4. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
5. Brush the bread slices lightly with the remaining olive oil and toast in the oven until golden on each side.
6. Spread the tomato mixture over the toasted bread.
7. Garnish with parsley and thyme sprigs and serve immediately.
Serves 6.
